name: io.github.mregmi/ragora-mcp
title: Ragora
description: Search your knowledge bases from any AI assistant using hybrid RAG.

environmentVariables.name: RAGORA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Ragora API key (starts with sk_live_). Get one at https://ragora.app/settings?tab=developer. Pass as Authorization: Bearer header.

tools.name: discover_collections
tools.description: List all knowledge bases you have access to, with descriptions, stats, available operations, and usage examples.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search across all your knowledge bases at once. Returns ranked results with relevance scores and source metadata.

tools.name: search_collection
tools.description: Search a specific knowledge base by name or slug, with optional tag and metadata filters.
